_meta.title: Texting Wrapped — Shareable Card Stats
_meta.description: The 7 highest-signal comparative stats for share cards. Each gives a copy template (with placeholders for the user's own value), the population baseline, source_key, and confidence.

cards.title: Reply Speed
cards.copy_template: You replied within {user_avg_min} on average — the typical person your age takes {peer_avg_min}.
cards.note: Compute the user's value directly from their own message metadata; baseline is open-time not reply-time.

cards.title: Daily Message Volume
cards.copy_template: You sent {user_count} messages — that's {more_or_less} than {pct}% of people.

baseline.age_note: lol & hehe skew oldest; emoji youngest

cards.title: The Period Tell
cards.copy_template: You end {pct}% of your messages with a period. Younger texters read that as passive-aggressive.

baseline.finding: period-ending texts rated less sincere (digital only)

cards.title: Group Chat Contribution
cards.copy_template: In your group chats you sent {pct}% of all messages. In ~8% of group chats, one person sends over half of everything.

cards.title: Emoji Intensity
cards.copy_template: You used {user_count} emoji this year — top {pct}% of your age group.

cards.title: Your Texting Age
cards.copy_template: You text like a {estimated_band}. Strongest tells: {top_features}.
cards.note: Highest-engagement card; frame as playful, not an identity claim.
